name._value: [Forest of Patience] Sabitrama and the Diet Medicine

parent._value: [Forest of Patience] Sabitrama and the Mysterious Medicine

1._value: In front of the #m10005001#, I met #b#p603##k, a medicinal herb trader who seems to be the younger brother of #p602#. He said he found a place where he can finally find the herb that he needed for this medicine he's working on... and he asked if I could go in that forest and grab an herb called #b#t4031025##k. It consists of green grass and a small pink flower... I should remember this well and get him the exact same one. I heard the place is near #m10002000#... I should go there and talk to this guy #b#p306##k...

2._value: Thankfully I got the flower that #p603# wanted from the Forest of Patience, and as a sign of appreciation, he gave me a #bscroll for overall armor#k. Oh, and he also said that from here on out, I can enter the Forest of Patience without having to pay #p306# of #m10002000#. From what I've heard, the diet medicine #p603#'s working on is for #p306#'s fiance... I better get back in the Forest of Patience when I have some time...

0._value: Wait, hold on one second. I am an herb-collector traveling around the world finding herbs. I'm looking for useful medicinal herbs around this area. It's been hard finding those these days... so, hey, have you found a place where the herbs run aplenty?

1._value: Actually I've found a place where you can find good medicinal herbs. It's at a forest not too far from here... lots of obstacles around the area but I can tell in the end there will be goods available for us to use... so what do you think? Do you want to go there in my place?

0._value: Thank you. The place where you can find the mysterious herb is actually a place you've been to before, #m10002000#. I heard someone's accepting an entrance fee at the entrance... you have the mesos to go in, right? Sorry but I've spent all my money traveling so I'm afraid I can't help you with that...

1._value: Yes! I'll explain to you about the herb you'll be getting for me. There are similar herbs around so make sure you remember this. The herb you'll need to get is #b#t4031025##k, and the flower looks like this #i4031025#. Look carefully and please get the same one as I described for you.

0._value: Really. You look like you can just breeze through there... please come back here when you have time. I'll be waiting for you.

Ohhh... this is IT! With #b#t4031025##k, I can finally make the diet medicine!! Hahaha, if you ever feel like you have gained weight, feel free to find me, because by then, I may have a special medicine for just that!

1._value: Oh, I almost forgot. Since you helped me out, I should thank you for your hard work. Here, take this scroll. My brother made this for me a while back, and it adds to the guarding abilities of overall armor. Hopefully you'll use it well. And from here on out,  #p306# will let you in free. Thanks for your help...

0._value: You haven't gotten the herb yet. The herb you need to get is #b#t4031025##k. The roots look like this #i4031025#. Remember it and get it from #p306# in #m10002000#.
